高文強硬回應基沙文:巴塞打法我話事！

對於基沙文（Antoine Griezmann）不滿自己在巴塞的出場位置，主教練朗奴高文（Ronald Koeman）予以強硬回應：「巴塞的打法，我話事！」

基沙文本週在法國隊的訪談中說：「教練（迪甘斯，Didier Deschamps）知道該讓我打甚麼位置，我把握住這個局面，這個位置，以及教練和隊友對我的信心。」基沙文這番話，被媒體普遍解讀為間接表示對高文的不滿，因為在巴塞，高文讓基沙文打右翼，但這並不是他喜歡的位置。

對此，高文的回應十分強硬：「我和基沙文談了，我告訴他，我要考慮甚麼是對球隊最好的。我認為他在右路對我們最有效。」

「他能打三個位置，他還能打10號位或者9號位，事實上，當我執教荷蘭時，有一場對法國，他就是打右路，和在巴塞一樣。」

「我與基沙文沒有問題，在三個攻擊位置上，我每個位置只能派一個人，我沒有讓任何球員打不屬於他的位置。基沙文可以靠他的左腳打邊路內切的踢法，如果他更喜歡另一個位置，那就是這樣，但我們不能讓10球員都打同一個位置。」

「出於對全隊的考慮，我做出決定，主教練話事，球員必須在出場時發揮出最佳水平。」

巴塞版「官媒」《阿斯報》更加不留情面，對巴塞兩將法蘭基迪莊和基沙文大肆抨擊。指出兩人分別坐擁8600萬歐元和1.2億歐元身價，而且已經給予一年時間適應，因此再沒有任何藉口掩飾差勁表現，球會和球迷亦已失去耐性，認為最佳辦法是將兩人貶落後備作為懲罰，甚至如標題所言，改踢B隊出戰預備組賽事。

同在80分鐘被調離陣的法蘭基迪莊，同被狠批得體無完膚。「他的失誤，他的幼稚和不成熟，在禁區內無故撞跌達高南，不能再給予任何藉口」，指出今年1月作客2：2完場前遭愛斯賓奴追平痛失兩分一仗，種下主帥華維迪被辭退禍根，該仗75分鐘領紅牌被逐的迪莊，當時也是流露昨仗一樣的迷失表情，跟2018/19球季帶領阿積士晉身歐聯四強的他簡直判若兩人云云。

On Koeman :

On Griezmann :
"I see Griezmann well, as always. We know what this profession is like and sometimes things get better and sometimes worse, but I see him happy and working in training. He will surely bring us many things."

🗣 | Ronald Koeman's press conference ahead of the game against Ferencváros.

"We want to start the Champions League well, win the game and have peace of mind."

"There is always pressure when you are a Barça player or coach. There is pressure to win games. It's normal for there to be difficult moments, but we are optimistic about tomorrow's game. We have to go from game to game."

On Dembélé :
"Dembélé is training well. It's true that in the first half he lost a lot of balls, but it's also part of his way of playing. I told him to play more openly and the minutes he played in the second half were better.”

On Messi :
"Messi is happy, he's playing well, he wants to be the captain of the team and play. I have no complaints, I have no doubt about his performance. He will surely score in the next games."

On the results so far :
"We've played four games and we've scored eight goals, I don't know if there is any team who does better. I'm not worried about scoring goals, we have enough quality. The last two games we've also played against teams that defend very well."

"I'm not disappointed, of course there is room for improvement, but I see the team happy. You can never be disappointed by a player who works hard, my job is to try to improve them"

On Barça's UCL form in recent years :
"I don't know what was missing in previous years for Barça to win the Champions League. If we fail this season, I will be able to answer that."

On Ansu Fati and Pedri :
"Ansu and Pedri are ready to be starters. It doesn't depend on age, it depends on performance. I am very happy for them, they are young and they will have ups and downs in which we will have to help, they are both doing very well."

On Griezmann's form :
"Griezmann knows his situation perfectly and the only thing he can do is work hard."
